description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a matte black and metallic gray finish, accented by a cyan line running along the receiver. The body is robust, with a boxy receiver and a prominent magazine well below, suggesting a magazine-fed mechanism. The stock is solid and ergonomic, with a slight curve for shoulder comfort, and the grip is textured for secure handling. The top of the receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and a small sight is already attached. The barrel is short and integrated into the receiver, with no visible ribbing or venting, giving it a modern, urban appearance. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black and metallic gray finish, featuring a cyan accent and a solid ergonomic stock. It has a boxy receiver, a magazine-fed design, and a Picatinny rail with a mounted sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the solid stock, boxy receiver, magazine, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the stock and the alignment of the sight along the top rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and grip.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel opening, the Picatinny rail, and the compact profile of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and integrated with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
